Description: Point in Time SEDOL of the Security
Intangible Asset Intensity score, normalized [0,1], summarizing a company's intangible capital relative to adjusted assets
Knowledge Capital Intensity score (from capitalized/depreciated R&D divided by adjusted assets), scaled [0,1]
Organizational Capital Intensity score (from capitalized/depreciated org. capital/SG&A divided by adjusted assets), scaled [0,1]
Market capitalization of the company in US dollars as of the score date
